name: Pumpkin Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1) Whisk the eggs in a mixing bowl until light and fluffy for 1 to 2 minutes. Gradually whisk in the sugar, then continue whisking until fully blended for about 1 minute more. Pour in the cream and milk, then whisk to combine.
2) In another bowl, pour about 1 cup of the cream base, add the pumpkin, nutmeg, and cinnamon, and stir until well mixed. Return this mixture to the remaining cream base and blend thoroughly.
3) Pour the mixture into an ice cream maker and freeze according to the manufacturer's instructions. This recipe yields approximately 1 quart. Typed by Lynn Thomas DCQP82A. Source: Ben & Jerry's Ice Cream & Dessert Book. Lynn's Notes: I believe this would make a delicious ice cream pie when placed in a graham cracker crust.
